production._comment: Replace the placeholder values below before submitting. Run 'eas submit --help' for more info.

ios._appleId_note: Your Apple ID email used to log in to App Store Connect
ios._ascAppId_note: The numeric App ID from App Store Connect (App Information > Apple ID)
ios._appleTeamId_note: Your 10-character Apple Developer Team ID from developer.apple.com/account

android._serviceAccountKeyPath_note: Path to your Google service account JSON key (download from Google Play Console). Never commit this file.
